lines.speaker: Carlos
lines.instructions: Speak in a warm, confident, conversational tone. Keep pacing measured and clear with brief pauses.
lines.text: Analizamos arquitectura orientada a eventos con colas y procesamiento asincrono.

lines.speaker: Lucia
lines.instructions: Speak in a bright, friendly, conversational tone. Keep pacing measured and clear with brief pauses.
lines.text: Por ejemplo, que coste pagas cuando fuerzas ordering total en una cola que crece rapido.

lines.speaker: Carlos
lines.instructions: Speak in a warm, confident, conversational tone. Keep pacing measured and clear with brief pauses.
lines.text: En observabilidad cubrimos tracing distribuido, metricas y correlacion por request id.

lines.speaker: Lucia
lines.instructions: Speak in a bright, friendly, conversational tone. Keep pacing measured and clear with brief pauses.
lines.text: Entonces el tradeoff real no es resiliencia gratis, sino latencia frente a estabilidad.

lines.speaker: Carlos
lines.instructions: Speak in a warm, confident, conversational tone. Keep pacing measured and clear with brief pauses.
lines.text: Tambien tratamos idempotencia, deduplicacion y consistencia eventual entre servicios.

lines.speaker: Lucia
lines.instructions: Speak in a bright, friendly, conversational tone. Keep pacing measured and clear with brief pauses.
lines.text: Y que riesgo asumes si versionas contratos sin observar a los consumidores rezagados.

lines.speaker: Carlos
lines.instructions: Speak in a warm, confident, conversational tone. Keep pacing measured and clear with brief pauses.
lines.text: Cerramos con estrategia de canary rollout y rollback automatico por SLOs.

lines.speaker: Lucia
lines.instructions: Speak in a bright, friendly, conversational tone. Keep pacing measured and clear with brief pauses.
lines.text: Si no mides esos bordes, el sistema parece robusto solo mientras todo va bien.

lines.speaker: Carlos
lines.instructions: Speak in a warm, confident, conversational tone. Keep pacing measured and clear with brief pauses.
lines.text: Por eso la robustez real se juega en las rutas feas, no en la demo limpia.

lines.speaker: Lucia
lines.instructions: Speak in a bright, friendly, conversational tone. Keep pacing measured and clear with brief pauses.
lines.text: Y ahi el detalle operativo pesa mas que cualquier arquitectura bonita.
